name: TestRegister_RateLimitingReturns429
description: TestRegister_RateLimitingReturns429 verifies that the graphdb routes are wiredwith the rate-limiting middleware and that requests exceeding the per-IP limitare rejected with 429 before reaching the handler.Because the rate limiter is registered as the outermost middleware layer(before the permissions check), even unauthenticated requests count againstthe limit and trigger 429 once the budget is exhausted.
descriptionHtml: TestRegister_RateLimitingReturns429 verifies that the graphdb routes are wiredwith the rate-limiting middleware and that requests exceeding the per-IP limitare rejected with 429 before reaching the handler.Because the rate limiter is registered as the outermost middleware layer(before the permissions check), even unauthenticated requests count againstthe limit and trigger 429 once the budget is exhausted.
